app.title: World Cup 2026 Bets
app.tagline: FIFA World Cup 2026 · Jun 11 – Jul 19, 2026 · USA, Canada & Mexico

rules.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about how the pool works.
rules.howScoringWorksBody: Once a match finishes upstream, the leaderboard updates automatically within about a minute. There is no need for an admin to recalculate after every match — the recalculate button is only used at the end of the tournament to award the winner / top scorer / top assist bonuses.
rules.exactScoreBonusBody: Once you reach 3 exact-score predictions, you receive a one-time +3 point bonus. The bonus is awarded once and does not increase as you accumulate more exact-score hits.
rules.privacyBody: Other participants' predictions are kept private until kickoff. The moment the match starts (by kickoff time or live status), everyone's predictions become visible on the homepage Live Predictions panel.

login.title: World Cup 2026
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

register.title: Request Access
register.subtitle: An admin will approve your account
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.successBody: Your account is pending admin approval. Once approved, log in and set your tournament bets from your Profile page.

rules.intro: Predict the score of every World Cup match before it kicks off. The more accurate your predictions, the more points you earn.
rules.exactScore: Exact Score — predict the exact final score → 3 pts
rules.exactScoreHigh: Exact Score (4+ goals) — high-scoring game, exact score → 5 pts
rules.correctResult: Correct Result — right winner or draw, wrong score → 1 pt
rules.exactScoreBonus: Exact-Score Bonus — 3 or more exact-score hits across the tournament → one-time +3 pts
rules.tournamentWinner: Tournament Winner — pick the World Cup champion → 15 pts
rules.topScorer: Top Scorer — pick the Golden Boot winner → 15 pts
rules.topAssist: Top Assist — pick the most-assists player → 15 pts

home.noMatchesTodaySub: Check the All Games page for upcoming fixtures.
home.bonusNote: Optional — fill in only at end of tournament to award bonus points:

leaderboard.exactBonusTooltip: One-time +3 bonus for reaching 3 exact-score predictions.

allGames.title: All Matches
allGames.subtitle: FIFA World Cup 2026 · Full Schedule
allGames.noMatchesFilter: No matches match the current filter.
allGames.scheduleNotAvailableBody: The World Cup 2026 fixtures haven't been published yet. Check back closer to the tournament start on June 11, 2026.

topScorers.title: Golden Boot
topScorers.subtitle: FIFA World Cup 2026 · Everyone's tournament picks
topScorers.hiddenBody: Top scorer and top assist picks stay private until the World Cup begins on June 11, 2026. Make your picks on your Profile page before then.
topScorers.fetchError: Could not load tournament picks. Please try again later.

predictions.heading: My Match Predictions
predictions.empty: You haven't placed any match predictions yet.
predictions.emptySub: Go to All Games and click on a match to place your bet.

bets.heading: Tournament Bets
bets.lockedNote: The World Cup has started. Your tournament bets are locked.
bets.editableNote: You can change these until the tournament starts on June 11, 2026.
bets.playerListUnavailable: Player list will be supplied by the admin.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage user registrations and approvals
admin.deniedBody: You do not have permission to view this page.

delete.title: Delete User
delete.body: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}} ({{email}})?
delete.warning: This will also remove all their match predictions. This cannot be undone.

betModal.title: Place Your Prediction

betModal.incompleteBody: Please enter a score for both teams.
betModal.errorBody: Failed to save prediction. Try again.
